description_long: This object is a sleek, rectangular mobile phone with a metallic frame and a large black glass touchscreen dominating the front. The back features a brushed metal finish with a prominent silver Apple logo centered near the top, and a small camera lens and flash in the upper left corner. The sides are thin and flat, with visible physical buttons on the left edge, including two circular volume buttons and a small switch, while the right edge is smooth and unadorned. The top edge houses a small power button, and the bottom edge (not visible) would typically contain a charging port and speaker grilles. The device is primarily gray and black, with subtle metallic accents, and its overall design is minimalist and modern. The screen is currently blank, indicating the device is either off or in standby mode.
description: A slim, rectangular mobile phone with a black glass front, metallic gray back, and visible Apple logo. Features include a blank screen, side buttons, and a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing a large black glass touchscreen with a circular home button at the bottom and a slim metallic bezel.
description_view_1: Left edge view displaying the phone's thin profile with no visible buttons or features.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a brushed metallic surface, a silver Apple logo centered near the top, and a small camera with flash in the upper left corner.
description_view_3: Right edge view showing two circular volume buttons and a small switch, all positioned near the top of the edge.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, near the top, with a metallic finish that contrasts against the darker brushed metal surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is completely blank, showing no content, icons, or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: A single small camera lens and flash are located in the upper left corner on the back of the device.
attribute_button_layout: Two circular volume buttons and a small mute switch are located on the left edge near the top; a power button is present on the top edge.
